Applicants impugned the said judgment and decree In Civil Appeal No. 42/2011 which was heard and allowed by the learned IIId Additional District Judge Dadu vide judgment and decree, dated 13.03.2U12 and 15.03,2OI2 respectively and remanded the case trial Court to decide accordance wvith lav allowing the applicants cross-taming the respondent/ witness and their evidence Thereafter, the learned trial Court after pro anu cunitra @vidence Of the parties decreed the suit of the respondent for the recovery of Rs, 9,05,064/= by substantial loss due to breach of contract, loss reputation mental torture vide judgment ٨٥ decree, dated 28-02-2013, Against that the applicants preferred Civil Appeal No 26 of ZUI3, which was heard and dismissed by the learned IId Additional District Judge Dadu vide Judgment and decree uated 29.01,2014, Aggrieved by the concurrent of the Courts below the applicants have preferred this revision application filing Pad proquct applicants aircsh /aft٤[ leading recudini calculating tndings
